series_metadata.series_description: Includes: internal correspondence (memos, emails, letters from state employees); correspondence from external parties including individuals and organizations seeking information pertaining to the board, it''''s laws, rules, and policies; and, other miscellaneous inquires. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: six (6) months and Similar General Schedule: GAR-CM-02. ; Paper: six (6) months and Similar General Schedule: GAR-CM-02
